description_long: This is a sturdy, metal-framed high chair with a black, textured seat and backrest, designed for use in educational or public urban settings. The chair features a prominent, rectangular writing tablet attached to the right arm, supported by a curved metal bracket, and secured with visible fasteners. Below the seat, there is a metal rack for storage, suitable for holding books or bags. The legs are tubular and reinforced for stability, with rubberized feet for grip. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and function over aesthetics, with all surfaces finished in matte black. The chair does not include a safety harness or elevated seat typical of infant high chairs, and the writing tablet appears fixed in place.
description: A robust black metal high chair with a fixed writing tablet and under-seat storage rack, designed for public or educational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the seat, backrest, and the full writing tablet extending from the right arm.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the thickness of the writing tablet and the curved support bracket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest and the metal storage rack beneath the seat.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the absence of a tablet on this side and the open frame structure.
attribute_footrest_design: A horizontal metal rack beneath the seat serves as a basic footrest, consisting of parallel bars with no adjustability.
